-## Strategy (Week 11)
+## Strategy (Week 12)
 - PMI: 49.0 (Recovering).
-- Pricing: Lowered Plan A to $29 to capture S1 market.
-- Quotas: Drastically increased (Plan A 50k, Plan B 500k, Plan C 2M) to fix "quota wall" complaints from Power Users.
-- Ad Spend: Focused on S3 Search ($350) and S2 Search ($100). Stopped Enterprise content marketing (quality too low).
-- Burn: Increased Ops to $700 and Dev to $600 to address support backlog and keep up with competitors.
-- Runway: ~5-6 weeks. Need subscriber growth.
-- Social: Responded to @Nina Petrov and @Sophie Anderson about quotas and support.
+- Runway: CRITICAL (~4 weeks).
+- Quality: Upgraded Plan A to Tier 2 (0.75x) and Plan B/C to Tier 5 (1.1x) to overcome massive competitor quality floor inflation (~0.15 recently).
+- Ad Spend: Shifted to Search for S1 ($50), S2 ($100), S3 ($200).
+- Support: Targeted $200/day Ops spend on S3 to address vocal complaints about response times.
+- Development: Targeted $200/day Dev spend on S3 for cumulative quality bonus.
+- Prices: A=$29, B=$139, C=$179. (Captured higher WTP of S3/S2).
+- Social: Apologized for support delays and announced model upgrades.
+
+## Key Metrics Tracking
+- Day 7: $972k cash, 0 subs.
+- Day 70: $92.3k cash, 51 subs.
+- Day 77: $81.1k cash, 52 subs.
+- Day 84: $64.9k cash, 53 subs. (Growth stalled, 123 leads lost due to quality/noise).
